title: CTAS
description: Controller Agnostic Structure (CTAS). A document carries inputs, exactly one 'controller' component, and outputs. Like CONAS (and unlike SAS/RAS, which discriminate device type at the top level), CTAS keeps a single 'controller' field and discriminates the functional class internally on controller.manufacturerInfo.datasheetInfo.function.category, because the parametric core is shared across all controller categories and only category-gated capability sub-objects differ. Every valid CTAS document is also a valid PEAS document (the `controller` branch).

inputs.description: Design requirements and operating points for this controller.
inputs.title: inputs

outputs.description: Computed results per operating point. outputs[i] aligns positionally with inputs.operatingPoints[i].
outputs.title: outputs
